scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: chmod +x node_modules/.pnpm/@esbuild+*/node_modules/@esbuild/*/bin/esbuild 2>/dev/null; find node_modules/.pnpm -maxdepth 7 -path '*@esbuild*/bin/esbuild' -type f -exec chmod +x {} + 2>/dev/null; node artifacts/api-server/build.mjs
scripts.build:all: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
